summary: Add a persistent right-hand or left-hand control choice and strictly block the unselected hand from all gestures.
scope: Add an exclusive right-hand or left-hand segmented control to the main menu, defaulting to right.
Filter poses before GestureEngine so the unselected hand and unknown handedness cannot trigger any action.
Cancel active gesture state immediately when the selected hand changes.
Keep MediaPipe at numHands 1 and hide the unselected hand skeleton in the calibration preview.
validation: swift test passed 14 tests including selected-hand acceptance and rejection
TypeScript typecheck and native recognizer build passed
Release app build and strict codesign verification passed
notes: The selected hand is stored locally in UserDefaults; a fresh install defaults to right.
macos-v0.5.1 remains the rollback point before this feature.
